GitHub Download
🎤 Autodesk University / DevCon 2026

RAPS CLI Sessions

Three deep-dive sessions on AI-powered APS automation, enterprise-scale ACC workflows, and production-ready CLI tooling.

All sessions confirmed
📍 Speaker: Dmytro Yemelianov
🤖
Session 1257 30-minute deep dive

AI Pair-Assistant for APS Operators: The End of Scripts?

Explore how Model Context Protocol (MCP) connects AI assistants to live APS APIs. See real demonstrations of conversational APS operations—no scripting required.

Learning Objectives

  • ✓ Understand how Model Context Protocol (MCP) connects AI assistants to APS APIs
  • ✓ See real demonstrations of AI-assisted APS operations—no scripting required
  • ✓ Evaluate when AI assistance replaces, augments, or complements traditional automation

AI Pillars

Automate Assist Augment

Audience

Business Decision Makers Developers/Architects

APS Components

Authentication OSS Model Derivative Data Management
View Full Session →
🚀
Session 1258 30-minute deep dive

Zero to Production: Shipping an AI-Ready APS CLI in 30 Min

A speedrun from zero tooling to production-ready APS workflow. Install, configure, and connect to AI assistants—all live, all real.

Learning Objectives

  • ✓ Install and configure raps CLI for APS operations in under 5 minutes
  • ✓ Execute common APS workflows (auth, buckets, translations) from the command line
  • ✓ Connect raps CLI to AI assistants via MCP for intelligent automation

AI Pillars

Automate Assist

Audience

Developers/Architects

APS Components

Authentication OSS Model Derivative Data Management +1 more
View Full Session →
🏗️
Session 1259 30-minute deep dive

ACC at Enterprise Scale: Automating the Impossible

Break the math that doesn't work. Transform hours of manual ACC administration into seconds of scripted operations across 200+ projects.

Learning Objectives

  • ✓ Understand the challenges of managing ACC at enterprise scale (100+ projects, 10,000+ files)
  • ✓ Learn automation patterns for bulk operations: issues, submittals, checklists, and file management
  • ✓ Discover how to integrate ACC workflows with enterprise systems using scriptable CLI tools

AI Pillars

Automate

Audience

Business Decision Makers Developers/Architects

APS Components

Data Management ACC Issues ACC Submittals ACC Checklists +2 more
View Full Session →
DY

Dmytro Yemelianov

Creator of RAPS CLI. A decade of experience building Autodesk integrations across Vault, Inventor, AutoCAD, and the entire APS ecosystem.

GitHub → Website →
